rationale: Russian strikes on Kyiv continue as background, while falling oil prices offer mild economic relief for Polish residents; no qualitative new escalation toward Poland. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline from the US-Iran deal provides modest relief on energy costs for Polish households and businesses, though this is an ongoing trend rather than a new shock.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Continued Russian strikes on Kyiv remain a background concern for Poland given proximity and refugee ties, but no qualitative escalation toward Polish territory is reported.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan investment deal signals continued Western economic cooperation; indirect positive signal for EU trade environment but minimal direct impact on Polish daily life.
